title: Shell & Tube Heat Exchanger Fouling Simulation (Epstein Model)
description: Simulated fouling resistance time-series for a Shell & Tube heat exchanger. Generated using the Epstein (1993) Arrhenius + shear-removal ODE model. 16 temperature scenarios (50–125°C), hourly resolution over 1 year. Includes fouling resistance Rf, degraded U, heat duty, thermal efficiency, and pressure drop. Suitable for predictive maintenance ML tasks.

resources.description: Main dataset: 16 temperature scenarios x 8760 hourly timesteps = ~140k rows. Columns: T_in_C, T_in_K, time_h, Re, u_m_s, tau_w_Pa, Rf_m2K_W, U_overall_W_m2K, U_clean_W_m2K, Q_W, Q_clean_W, thermal_efficiency, dP_Pa, fouling_factor_TEMA.
